infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 22 - 24 May 2026 The team representative is required to report to the Stewards at 17:30, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team Document 66 Date 23 May 2026 Time 16:36 No / Driver 14 - Fernando Alons

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The team representative is required to report to the Stewards at 17:30, in relation to the incident
below:
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team
Document 66
Date 23 May 2026
Time 16:36
No / Driver 14 - Fernando Alonso
Reason Alleged breach of Article B1.6.2a of the FIA F1 Regulations – Unsafe release of Car
14 at 15:59.
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers
